Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import pyreadstat
df, meta = pyreadstat.read_dta\('data/DC 2021 v1.dta'\)
print\('Shape:', df.shape\)
print\('\\nColumn names:'\)
for col in df.columns:
    label = meta.column_names_to_labels.get\(col, ''\)
    vals = meta.variable_value_labels.get\(col, {}\)
    print\(f'  {col}: {label[:80]}'\)
    if vals:
        print\(f'    options: {dict\(list\(vals.items\(\)\)[:5]\)}'\)
")
